response.justification: The candidate is significantly overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with 15+ years of experience as a Senior/Staff engineer across multiple stacks including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS. Technical skills strongly align with requirements, but the seniority mismatch raises concerns about retention, compensation expectations, and role satisfaction. Berlin location matches the on-site requirement, and basic German may be a limitation depending on workplace language.
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS matching the stack
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture)
concerns: Severely overqualified — seniority mismatch with junior/mid-level posting
No PostgreSQL experience listed (primarily MongoDB and MySQL)
Only basic German may limit collaboration in a German construction/consulting domain
